CGAL::Heat_method_3::Direct.name: CGAL::Heat_method_3::Direct
CGAL::Heat_method_3::Direct.brief: A tag class used to specify that the heat method is applied to the input mesh.

CGAL::Heat_method_3::Intrinsic_Delaunay.name: CGAL::Heat_method_3::Intrinsic_Delaunay
CGAL::Heat_method_3::Intrinsic_Delaunay.brief: A tag class used to specify that the heat method applies the intrinsic Delaunay triangulation to the input mesh.

CGAL::Heat_method_3::Surface_mesh_geodes.name: CGAL::Heat_method_3::Surface_mesh_geodesic_distances_3
CGAL::Heat_method_3::Surface_mesh_geodes.brief: Class Surface_mesh_geodesic_distances_3 computes estimated geodesic distances for a set of source vertices where sources can be added and removed.
CGAL::Heat_method_3::Surface_mesh_geodes.detailed: The class performs a preprocessing step that only depends on the mesh, so that the distance computation takes less time after changes to the set of sources. TriangleMesh a triangulated surface mesh, model of FaceListGraph and HalfedgeListGraph Mode must be Intrinsic_Delaunay to indicate that an intrinsic Delaunay triangulation is internally constructed or Direct to indicate that the input mesh should be used as is. If Intrinsic_Delaunay , then the type TriangleMesh must have an internal property for vertex_point and its value type must be the same as the value type of VertexPointMap . If Direct , then the input mesh should not have any degenerate faces. VertexPointMap a model of ReadablePropertyMap with boost::graph_traits<TriangleMesh>::vertex_descriptor as key and Traits::Point_3 as value type. The default is typename boost::property_map< TriangleMesh, vertex_point_t>::const_type . LA a model of SparseLinearAlgebraWithFactorTraits_d . If CGAL_EIGEN3_ENABLED is defined, then Eigen_solver_traits<Eigen::SimplicialLDLT<typename Eigen_sparse_matrix<double>::EigenType > > is used as default Traits a model of HeatMethodTraits_3 . The default is the Kernel of the value type of the vertex point map (extracted using Kernel_traits ).

members.name: Base_helper
members.return_type: internal::Base_helper< TriangleMesh, Traits_type, Mode, LA_type, Vertex_point_map >

members.name: vertex_descriptor
members.brief: Vertex descriptor type.

members.name: Vertex_const_range
members.brief: a model of ConstRange with an iterator that is model of ForwardIterator with vertex_descriptor as value type.

members.name: Vertex_point_map
members.brief: Vertex point map type derived from VertexPointMap .

members.name: Surface_mesh_geodesic_distances_3
members.brief: Constructor.

members.name: Surface_mesh_geodesic_distances_3
members.brief: Constructor.

members.name: triangle_mesh
members.brief: returns the triangle mesh the algorithm is running on.

members.name: add_source
members.brief: adds vd to the source set, returning false if vd is already in the set.

members.name: add_sources
members.brief: adds the range of vertices to the source set.
members.detailed: VertexConstRange a model of the concept ConstRange with value type boost::graph_traits<TriangleMesh>::vertex_descriptor

members.name: remove_source
members.brief: removes vd from the source set, returning true if vd was in the set.

members.name: clear_sources
members.brief: clears the current source set.

members.name: sources
members.brief: returns the source set.

members.name: estimate_geodesic_distances
members.brief: fills the distance property map with the estimated geodesic distance of each vertex to the closest source vertex.
members.detailed: VertexDistanceMap a property map model of WritablePropertyMap with vertex_descriptor as key type and double as value type. vdm the vertex distance map to be filled If Mode is Direct , the support triangle mesh does not have any degenerate faces The key type is double even when used with an exact kernel.

HeatMethodTraits_3.name: HeatMethodTraits_3
HeatMethodTraits_3.brief: The concept HeatMethodTraits_3 describes the types, predicates, and constructions required by the traits class parameter of CGAL::Heat_method_3::Surface_mesh_geodesic_distances_3 .
HeatMethodTraits_3.detailed: Has models All models of the CGAL concept Kernel

members.name: Point_3
members.brief: The 3D point type.
members.detailed: It must be CopyConstructible and DefaultConstructible , and have a constructor with three parameters of a type constructibe from double .

members.name: Vector_3
members.brief: The 3D vector type.
members.detailed: It must be CopyConstructible and DefaultConstructible , and have a constructor with three parameters of a type constructibe from double .

members.name: Construct_vector_3
members.brief: Functor with operator: Vector_3 operator()(const Point_3 & from, const Point_3 & to) const , which constructs the vector from to - from .

members.name: Construct_sum_of_vectors_3
members.brief: Functor with operator: Vector_3 operator()(const Vector_3 & v, const Vector_3 & w) const , which constructs the vector v + w .

members.name: Construct_scaled_vector_3
members.brief: Functor with operator: Vector_3 operator()(const Vector_3 & v, double d) const , which constructs the vector d * v .

members.name: Construct_cross_product_vector_3
members.brief: Functor with operator: Vector_3 operator()(const Vector_3 & v, const Vector_3 & w) const , which constructs the cross product of v and w .

members.name: Compute_scalar_product_3
members.brief: Functor with operator: FT operator()(const Vector_3 & v, const Vector_3 & w) const , which constructs the scalar product of v and w .

members.name: Compute_squared_distance_3
members.brief: Functor with operator: FT operator()(const Point_3 & p, const Point_3 & q) const which computes the squared distance between p and q .

members.name: Compute_squared_length_3
members.brief: Functor with operator: FT operator()(const Vector_3 & v) const which computes the squared length of v .
